sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51926" key="kaqupobai/nw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καθυπο-βαίνω</orth>, <tns opt="n" TEIform="tns">pf.</tns> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-βέβηκα</foreign>, <sense id="n51926.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">occupy a lower place than</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τῶν ἐπάνω</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2133.tlg001:18" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ach.Tat.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Intr.Arat.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">18</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
